meaning: v.(使)边缘重叠成瓦状adj.重叠成瓦状的,鳞状的
examples: The rhizome is short, thick shape, cylinder, by most imbricate arrangement scaled leaf.
The structural types mainly are fault-related folds, imbricate structure and fault delta zone.
The imbricate fan of thrusts and soft layer are main structure features distinguishing thrust-nappe structure in magma-tic body area.
